hero.title: Your trusted technology
hero.desc: Certified hardware. Sovereign software. Excellence in training. SIGHT Africa builds Burundi's digital infrastructure for a connected future.

indexServices.title: Complete solutions for your digital transformation
indexServices.hardwareDesc: Dell, HP, Cisco certified equipment with official warranty and responsive support.
indexServices.softwareDesc: Sovereign software solutions adapted to Burundian realities.
indexServices.securityDesc: Audit, protection and securing of your information systems.
indexServices.academyDesc: Certified training in Cloud, Networks and development.
indexServices.consultingDesc: Strategic support for your digital transformation.
indexServices.maintenanceDesc: Continuous technical support and preventive maintenance.

cta.title: Ready to digitize your business?
cta.desc: Contact us for a free audit of your IT infrastructure and discover how SIGHT can accelerate your growth.

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: A comprehensive range of IT services to support your business in its digital transformation.
services.s1d: Direct import from our Dell, HP and Cisco partners. Certified equipment with official warranty, eliminating intermediaries for competitive prices.
services.s2d: Custom software solutions adapted to the Burundian market. ERP, school management, healthcare — Made in Burundi tools.
services.s3d: Complete protection of your information systems. Security audit, compliance and training your teams in best practices.
services.s4d: Technical certification center for graduates and professionals on cutting-edge technologies.
services.s5d: Strategic support for businesses and institutions in their digitalization journey.
services.s6d: Continuous technical support with rapid intervention. Preventive and corrective maintenance to ensure system availability.
services.s7d: Design, deployment and management of your network infrastructure and data center.
services.s8d: Migration and management of your applications in the cloud for more flexibility and resilience.

about.title: About SIGHT Africa
about.visionDesc: Become the leader in technology integration in Burundi by 2030, fostering national digital autonomy and actively contributing to the Burundi Vision 2040-2060.
about.missionDesc: Provide cutting-edge equipment, develop secure software solutions and strengthen local capabilities to accelerate the digital transformation of Burundi and East Africa.
about.integrityDesc: Fight against counterfeiting, certified and guaranteed products.
about.innovationDesc: Cutting-edge technology solutions adapted to the local context.
about.sovereigntyDesc: Development of local solutions to reduce technological dependence.
about.excellenceDesc: International standards in every service we offer.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.desc: We are ready to support you in your digital transformation.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successDesc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

blog.title: Blog & News
blog.desc: Discover our latest publications on technology and innovation in Burundi.
blog.comeback: Come back soon for our next publications!

programs.desc: Discover our innovation, training and digital transformation programs.
programs.noPrograms: No active programs at the moment.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.desc: Discover our latest delivered projects and achievements.

bitcoin.title: Bitcoin &
bitcoin.desc: SIGHT Africa explores decentralized technologies to strengthen financial sovereignty and digital inclusion in Burundi and East Africa.
bitcoin.custodyDesc: Education and tools for secure Bitcoin self-custody. Protect your digital assets without intermediaries.
bitcoin.lightningDesc: Implementation of Lightning payment solutions for fast, low-cost transactions adapted to the local market.
bitcoin.nodeDesc: Deployment and management of Bitcoin full nodes to strengthen the decentralized network in East Africa.
bitcoin.educationDesc: Training programs on monetary fundamentals, decentralization and the Bitcoin protocol.
bitcoin.remittanceDesc: Decentralized solutions for low-cost remittances between the diaspora and East Africa.
bitcoin.miningDesc: Exploration of eco-friendly Bitcoin mining solutions using local renewable energy.
bitcoin.ctaDesc: Contact us to discover how Bitcoin and decentralized technologies can transform your business.

academy.title: SIGHT Academy
academy.desc: Technical certification center for graduates and professionals. Strengthen your skills on cutting-edge technologies.
academy.cloudDesc: Master cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern architectures.
academy.cyberDesc: Learn to protect information systems against current threats.
academy.networkDesc: Design, deployment and administration of enterprise networks.
academy.webdevDesc: Front-end and back-end technologies to create modern applications.
academy.digitalDesc: Strategies and tools to drive organizational digitalization.
academy.certDesc: Preparation for internationally recognized certifications (CompTIA, Cisco, Microsoft).
